patient_summary: Olivia, a 73-year-old female (patient ID 104, phone +1 310 556 1256), has documented mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension, postoperative/unspecified anemia, and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Major procedures include a colonoscopy with biopsy on 02/21/2025 (Haroon M, MD). Key 07/03/2023 labs from Singing River: ferritin 266.8 ng/mL (H), iron 41 ug/dL (L), iron saturation 15% (L), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 ml/min/1.73m2 (L), triglycerides 158 mg/dL (H), LDL 62 mg/dL. Prior labs (Piedmont) include CHOLTOTAL 136 (07/17/2020) and BMP abnormalities (GLUCOSE 199 mg/dL on 01/11/2021). Functional limitations include difficulty walking. PHQ-2 and PHQ-9 scores were 0 on 03/28/2023. Conflicting demographic entries (DOB and legal sex) are documented in source records and preserved in conflicts.
